docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-03-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF JOHN MULCAHY & DEFENDANT JEREMY BOIVIN. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE, AND DEFENDANT WAS UNWILLING TO WAIVE SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AT TODAY'S HEARING. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,827.00 FILED BY MULCAHY, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT BOIVIN, JEREMY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MULCAHY, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOIVIN, JEREMY $2,827.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,917.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED OCT-11-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOIVIN, JEREMY
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULCAHY, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT BOIVIN, JEREMY
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE: $40.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MULCAHY, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT BOIVIN, JEREMY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-03-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-03-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-03-2016 - JUDGMENT.
